# Docs Templates

- Copy `story.md` into `docs/tasks/<slug>.md`.
- Copy `spec.md` into `docs/specs/<slug>.md`.
- Replace every placeholder and remove unused sections in the copied artifact.
- Keep spec sections ordered `Goal -> Design -> Requirements -> Tasks`; pipeline agents parse that contract.
- Keep templates generic and readable as plain Markdown.
- Do not turn a template itself into a real artifact.
